extension.description: Looks up intro timings from TheIntroDB while you watch. Uses TMDB ids when present; otherwise IMDb ids (tt…) with season/episode. Optional API key from theintrodb.org.
extension.news: v1.2.0 — Simplified codebase; IMDb fallback when TMDB is missing; TheIntroDB-only scope; trimmed settings; fixed service state after auto-skip toggle.
